entry.title: Copying Inspection Results After a Usage Decision
entry.content:
Hello,

My client used the "Copy Inspection Results" option in their S4Hana On-premises system even after the UD had been made.

They now request the same features on the public cloud. So, in the public cloud, is it possible to copy inspection results from one inspection lot to another after the usage decision has been made?

 

thanks / Suresh.E

entry.title: Re: Newly released! The much awaited SAP Sales Cloud V2 course and certification
entry.content:
Hi ,

How to get user id for practice, or any documents is there .

entry.title: Re: Explore cost-efficiently the latest SAP S/4HANA Build with Guided Beta SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02
entry.content:
Dear @MattHarding,

sorry for the inconvenience. I sent you a DM.
BR,
Necla

entry.title: Re: If Mobile Web is Dead, Why bother about web applications on mobile?
entry.content:
Agreed. It depends on the audience/ user space.

Regards.

ZFiori

🙂

entry.title: Re: Aggregation in CDS Custom entity display in RAP
entry.content:
Hi,

you have mispelled the annotation,

@Aggregation.Default: #SUM

is correct, but this never worked for me outside of a analytics app.

Regards,

  Wolfgang

entry.title: Re: 'Generate Mappings' or AI-functionality for emission factor mapping not working in SAP SFM
entry.content: Thanks as always @NicoWottke for the quick answer. Yes now I see this indeed and we have managed to get this working on our system. I now also see the codes that can be used for this.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Tree structure in Dropdown
entry.content: Could you please tell me is there any solution now?

entry.title: Flexible column layout in SAP MDK as Navigation and Display Page
entry.content:
Hi,

I'd like to know, if it's possible to somehow use the flexible column layout in the following way, since the app would only be used on tablets:

The left (start) page should be sort of a navigation page to jump to certain elements (divisions) on the right side. Here's a picture of how I would like it to be in the emulator:

I tried doing that with the cross navigation action and each button navigating to a different page, but the page on the right side should be one long form and not many single pages for each division.

 

I also couldn't find anything about the use of jumpTo() to e.g. scroll back to the top of a page? I guess it failed cause I can't scroll to an object, but how else would I do it? Here's my failed attempt:

export default function jumpToFC(clientAPI) {
    let scrollDestination = clientAPI.getPageProxy().getControl('SectionedTable0').getSection('SectionFormCell0');
    scrollDestination.scrollTo(0,0);   
}

 Thanks in advance for any kind of help 🙂

 

Greetings

Markus

entry.title: What's new in SAP Mobile Services - OData CSDL Modeler 1.1.4
entry.content:
In this blog post, we will show you the UX update in SAP Mobile Services - OData CSDL Modeler 1.1.4. SAP Mobile Services OData CSDL Modeler is an extension of Microsoft Visual Studio Code and SAP Business Application Studio which allows the mobile developers and business consultants to view the OData CSDL and EDMX model in a graphical manner.

First intall the latest OData CSDL Modeler from https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=SAPSE.vsc-extension-odata-csdl-modeler. After the installation, copy the OData CSDL file to your VSCODE workspace:

Right click the CSDL file and choose "Open With..." option:

In the context menu, choose "OData CSDL Modeler" menu item to open SAP Mobile Services OData CSDL Modeler:

After the OData CSDL Modeler shows up, you will first see a structured view for the CSDL model in the editor:

Under this view, you are able to see the entity types in the master view, and properties in the detail view for this CSDL model.

If you want to switch to a graphical view, choose the "Diagram" option in the toolbar:

You can move the diagram to view different parts of the model as well as zoom in/out in the canvas:

And if you want to view the metadata XML for the CSDL model, choose the "Metadata" view:

And finally, you can use the OData CSDL Modeler together with SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools so that the SAP backend OData services can be visualized in the mobile destinations from SAP Mobile Services:

In this blog post, we showed you the major UX update for SAP Mobile Services OData CSDL Modeler, as well as how to visualize the backend OData services of SAP Mobile Services using the combination of the OData CSDL Modeler and SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools.

entry.title: Re: Progression: Program type Progression
entry.content:
Hi Mehboob,

Check if any Program Plan setting is made for UG program(SC level) to consider preparatory program. When you are seeing Program type see radio button is for One program or All programs.

Hope you got the solution by now. If yes, share your feedback.

Rahman

entry.title: Re: Debug Mode(/H) history
entry.content:
Hi,

Raymond is right, SE16N_CD_KEY is the table for all changes done in the edit mode of SE16N (by activating gd-edit/sapedit in debug, with &SAP_EDIT, calling FM SE16N_INTERFACE with edit flag or by using t-code SE16N_EMERGENCY). You can see the entries in SE16N in this menu

I tested earlier and (unfortunately) this does not apply if you edit the table in the old SE16, you don't get the change documents saved in SE16N_CD_KEY.

Regarding changes done in debug, not sure if it's a special setting, but I can see in SM21 log if someone changed a value or jumped to other lines. For example 

The first 2 lines are about me changing the value of the CODE variable from SHOW to EDIT, the next 2 about jumping from line 33 to 46 and the last ones about changing value of SY-UCOMM to INSR, all done in code below for testing.

Manu

entry.title: Re: Assign Nota Fiscal Type to Sales Document Types - Public Cloud
entry.content: Can you please help answer this question?

entry.title: Legacy data transfer date XXXXXX is in a closed fiscal year
entry.content:
We are facing this issue in all company code after S4 PERSON_NAME migration. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Legacy data transfer date XXXXXX is in a closed fisca...
entry.content:
For example company code xxxx

 

faa_cmp

cc 1000

Seq.No. TransfrDat      Legacy Transfer Status

     1  01.04.2022 Ongoing (Other Postings Allowed    !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! this is not correct. You are still in status Ongoing and then you are trying to do another legacy segment.

go to FAA_CMP

 

Set status complete for the  legacy segment

SAVE

Go to FAA_CMP

Create a new legacy date segment

entry.title: Total Cost Commitment in CN41N report
entry.content: Total cost commitment column in Report CN41N is blank after creating the purchase order from purchase requisition. The amount is displayed in Plan cost but "Total Cost Commitment" column is still blank. How can I configure the purchase order amount as "Commitment" in MM or Project System.

entry.title: Re: Modify Z* Db table not working
entry.content: @ricky_shawJust click the links? Or ask GPT.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data and Analytics Forum 12.-13.11.2024
entry.content:
Hi Sven,

yes it is in German only. 

BR

Johann

entry.title: Re: Copying Inspection Results After a Usage Decision
entry.content:
Hello!

The ability to copy inspection results after a usage decision in SAP S/4HANA Cloud may differ from the on-premises version. It’s best to consult the SAP S/4HANA Cloud documentation.

 

 

Best Regards,

Panorama Charter

entry.title: Re: Depreciation below zero
entry.content: Hi Mark, thanks for your reply. For cost accounting purposes we would like to see the imputed depreciation after end of useful life of assets. This would only be in a non-posting depreciation area.

entry.title: Re: Screenshot not working (Android)
entry.content: I'm not familiar with Android ... I'm an iPhone guy. Maybe describe a little more what you want to do and the SAP Build people / the community can suggest something.

entry.title: Re: How to enable PDF Preview in smart form print preview
entry.content: My 2 cents. Maybe you are not using the normal way to preview i.e. pass CONTROL_PARAMETERS-PREVIEW = 'X' when generating the Smart Form.

entry.title: Hello Team, How to Auto populate data in mandatory fields in Service Now Incident via SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: I have integrated SNOW incident and SAP Cloud ALM. Now the incident is created but some of the mandatory fields are not auto populating the data. To customize the fields in mapping rule, I do not get the related documents. The mandatory fields are "Service", "Category" and "Channel". Does anyone have any idea how to proceed further ???

entry.title: Calling a BAPI inside a BADI
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

Recently I came across a query on :-

What are advantages and disadvantages of calling a BAPI inside a BADI ?

What are the  pitfalls that we enconunter when we call a BAPI inside a BADI ?

Can anyone here throw some light on the above said query. Thanks.

K.Kiran

please find the below SS of CNF DLV order.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for Transportation Management (WDTMB)
entry.content: NOT ABLE TO REACH THE LINK

entry.title: Apache spark dataframe jdbc write- how to use table_type= COLUMN during writing dataframe using jdbc
entry.content:
I have a apache spark dataframe, it has multiple columns with datatype of string, decimal, integer, boolean.

I want to write this dataframe to sap hana using spark jdbcDF.write.format("jdbc") . 

Problem: Spark dataframe is column type. BY default sap hana creates a table of row type. I want to be create a column type of table using jdbc options. But I could not find the solutions.

my code:

 

df.write.format("jdbc").option("driver", "com.sap.db.jdbc.Driver").option(
    "url", "jdbc:sap://10.10.xxx.xxx:30015/"
).option("dbtable", "SAP.example_table").option("user", "*****").option(
    "password", "********"
).mode(
    "overwrite"
).save()

 

Here I have used ngdbc jar (com.sap.db.jdbc.Driver)

I need to understand how can I create table with  table_type= COLUMN.

If I use the above code it will throw error saying 

 

com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: [264] (at 117): invalid datatype: TEXT type is not supported for row table: line 1 col 118 (at pos 117)

entry.title: Post scrap Qty equals to created production ord Qty in case of production failure at operation level
entry.content:
Hi PP Guru's,

Facing the below Error,
We have a scenario for our client in which due to production failure in operation level total production order quantity is supposed to be marked as Scrap while goods confirmation.(I'm unable to post and test this case)

Example: Production order quantity : 10 Qty

While goods confirmation in CO11N,

System proposed yeild to be confired 10 Qty.(we need yeild=0 Qty and scrap=10 Qty.)


Tried posting Goods movement for the header material: 0.00 Qty 


can anyone give me a practical example of how I should pass the values in Yeild and Scrap while goods confirmations.

Requesting@Raja_S_Reddy_B @former_member184574 to assist me.

Kindly update with your comments/feedback/inputs/advices, to make use of it as the Best, Quick & Easy Ref.

Regards,
Rajesh varma

entry.title: Re: Eclipse: How to see / change function module document...
entry.content: Thanks vulturas, I hoped that Eclipse might offer an embedded solution, not the old SAPGUI transaction 😉

entry.title: Re: ndc: BarcodeScannerButton not allowed to be placed in...
entry.content:
I also have a SimpleForm with a Label, Inputfield and custom control. It does not complain about it is not allowed. How did you specify your SimpleForm?

    <Label id='confLabel' text="{i18n>confirmationNumber}" />
    <Input id="confInput">
        <layoutData>
            <l:GridData span="L5 M5 S5" />
        </layoutData>
    </Input>
    <ndc:BarcodeScannerButton id="confScan"
        scanSuccess="onScanSuccess"
        scanFail="onScanError"
        inputLiveUpdate="onScanLiveupdate"
        dialogTitle="{i18n>confirmationNumber}">
        <layoutData>
            <l:GridData span="L1 M1 S1" />
        </layoutData>
    <ndc:BarcodeScannerButton>

entry.title: Copy Actuals to Forecast Version Until Start Month in SAP SAC Data Action Advanced Formula
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I need assistance with creating an advanced formula in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Data Action. My goal is to copy actual data to a selected forecast version based on user input, but the data should only be copied up to a specific month.

For example, if the Forecast version FC12024 is selected the forecast period start_month is July( which is maintained as an attribute in the version) then Actual data should be copied to the forecast version before the selected start month. In the above example, data from January to June should be copied to the forecast version for January to June.

Example:

  • If the start month for the forecast is July 2024 (Month 7):
    • Copy Actual data from January 2024 to June 2024 (Months 1 to 6) to the forecast version from January 2024 to June 2024 (Months 1 to 6).

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: If Mobile Web is Dead, Why bother about web applications on mobile?
entry.content: Discussion on 2014 clickbait blog post? 😄

entry.title: Re: ndc: BarcodeScannerButton not allowed to be placed in...
entry.content: Nothing special on the specification of the simple form:

entry.title: How to establish trust between two XSUAA protected approuters?
entry.content:
Hello community,

we are trying to nest one SAPUI5 component in another. While this is usually easily done by leveraging the component container control, our target setup seems to be challenging.

Application 1 is served via. a standalone approuter and nests Application 2 which is deployed to the HTML5 Application Repository and is served via the managed approuter. Both applications are XSUAA protected use the same identity provider.

 

The challenge seems to be the authorization part in the nesting process. The request from Application 1 to Application 2 always results in an HTTP 401, no matter the destinations authentication type and configuration.

Application 2 needs to be XSUAA protected to be able to use Principal Propagation to call ERP resources.

Is this setup technically possible? If so, how can we achieve it?

Thank you in advance,
Daniel

entry.title: Re: ndc: BarcodeScannerButton not allowed to be placed in...
entry.content: Did you try the <layoutData> <l:GridData span="L1 M1 S1" /> </layoutData>

entry.title: Re: Announcing SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 6th July 2024

entry.title: INTRODUCTION

entry.title: Re: How to create a Notification or a Situation when a In...
entry.content:
Hello SJlearner7861,

Did you already read this blog post Help - Why don't I get a situation notification? It should help you identifying if your configuration is right.

Best
 Angelika

entry.title: Re: Move Service from Free Plan to Standard Plan (BTP)
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

please refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/updating-abap-system and https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/using-free-service-plans#update-to-a-paid-service-plan 

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Stuck in userlane tutorial. Can I skip the step?
entry.content:
Sure, here is a screenshot with the button and then what appears when I click on it.

For the links as mentioned before I think I just started a trial here and then just followed the first tutorial that appeared. Unfortunately I don't see how to send you a direct link to the tutorial as it just becomes this button with instructions..

entry.title: Re: BP - Vendor - have multiple addresses
entry.content:
Hi,

Do you want to try maintaining in the Vendor Texts?

You can assign the source of the purchase order header text to be the vendor text.

But I’m not sure how to know which plant the material comes from.

entry.title: The problem of posting invoices for projects
entry.content: I have a problem with posting an invoice, when I try to send it to accounting, I get the message: Enter only one true account assignment - Message no. KI249. It is about posting the delivery via project, tcode VL01N. After that, tcode VF01 creates the invoice but does not allow it to be released to accounting with tcode VF02. In the sales order, I have entered both the WBS element and the order (Account Assignment). Can someone help with this problem?

entry.title: Re: Move Service from Free Plan to Standard Plan (BTP)
entry.content: Hi Peter! Thanks for you feedback. But as mentioned in my post above, we don't want to upgrade our free plan to standard plan but move a service from our free abap environment to our standard abap environment. Do you know, how to do this?

entry.title: Re: Print Template in SAP Dm not visible
entry.content: Hi Kartik, Thank you so much for your time and replies. I really appreciate it. I checked with formatter change still it couldnt show the preview. But what I found is that I can generate the preview only with the standard document and all the pdf uploaded in this print document is visible.

entry.title: Re: ndc: BarcodeScannerButton not allowed to be placed in...
entry.content: I guess, that the issue is caused by the ndc:BarcodeScannerButton not implementing the form Content interface: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/api/sap.ui.core.IFormContent

entry.title: Re: Move Service from Free Plan to Standard Plan (BTP)
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

assuming both service instances are created in the same global account, you should be able to move existing development objects with gCTS (if objects were created as part of a software component) or via abapGit if objects were created only locally. You can refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/transport-mechanisms 

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: SAP GUI 7.60 Patch h1 Unhandled exception has occurred in a component
entry.content: Pls see below recap as SAP is having same issue again as reported before. Pls help to check and adv, thanks very much ! See the end of this message for details on invoking just-in-time (JIT) debugging instead of this dialog box. ************** Exception Text ************** System.ArgumentException: Value does not fall within the expected range. at com.sap.nw.nwbc.core.implementation.Taskbar.api.TabbedThumbnailNativeMethods.SetIconicThumbnail(IntPtr hwnd, IntPtr hBitmap) at com.sap.nw.nwbc.core.implementation.Taskbar.api.TaskbarWindowManager.DispatchSendIconThumbnailMessage(Message& m, TaskbarWindow taskbarWindow) at com.sap.nw.nwbc.core.implementation.Taskbar.api.TaskbarWindowManager.DispatchMessage(Message& m, TaskbarWindow taskbarWindow) at com.sap.nw.nwbc.core.implementation.Taskbar.api.TabbedThumbnailProxyWindow.WndProc(Message& m) at System.Windows.Forms.Control.ControlNativeWindow.OnMessage(Message& m) at System.Windows.Forms.Control.ControlNativeWindow.WndProc(Message& m) at System.Windows.Forms.NativeWindow.Callback(IntPtr hWnd, Int32 msg, IntPtr wparam, IntPtr lparam) ************** Loaded Assemblies ************** mscorlib Assembly Version: 4.0.0.0 Win32 Version: 4.8.9241.0 built by: NET481REL1LAST_C CodeBase: file:///C:/Windows/Microsoft.NET/Framework/v4.0.30319/mscorlib.dll ---------------------------------------- ************** JIT Debugging ************** To enable just-in-time (JIT) debugging, the .config file for this application or computer (machine.config) must have the jitDebugging value set in the system.windows.forms section. The application must also be compiled with debugging enabled. For example: When JIT debugging is enabled, any unhandled exception will be sent to the JIT debugger registered on the computer rather than be handled by this dialog box.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 制造流程管理优化（二）生产订单批次自动创建
entry.content:
欢迎来到我的博客。

批次管理作为产品特性管理的一个重要手段，被广泛应用于各行各业。特别是在化工、食品、制药、快消等行业。而由于生产工艺或者材料的原因，不同批次的产品或者原料，在产品的属性上会有所不同如颜色、纯度等。或者出于对产品的保质期、质量追溯等原因，需要对同一物料，不同批次的产品或者原料进行区分，那么批次管理作为很好的管理方法来达到这个目的。SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition的批次管理贯穿了从原材料采购到产成品最终销售的端到端管理流程，它与分类&特性密切相关。

本篇博文的业务背景是：某客户已经启用了物料的批次管理，希望能够在生产订单下达时自动创建/确定批次，提升生产流程的管理效率。系统如何达成这一需求呢？

批次确定：

S/4HANA Cloud Public edition 可在以下5种业务场景中使用批次确定：

  1. 生产订单
  2. 流程订单
  3. 含部分订单的重复制造
  4. 不含部分订单的重复制造
  5. 看板库存转储补货策略

批次确定的五个步骤：

  • 定义条件表：条件表是构成批次搜索策略键值的字段的组合，条件表定义用于指定单个条件记录有效期的字段组合。下一步将使用它来定义访问顺序。
  • 定义访问顺序：系统在批次确定期间访问条件表的顺序。对一系列的条件表的存取顺序，找到条件记录后，后面没有执行完的不再执行。
  • 定义策略类型：创建策略记录时使用的缺省值.策略类型如常用的先进先出FIFO等。
  • 定义搜索过程：分配策略类型的顺序是系统搜索策略记录的顺序。
  • 搜索过程分配并检查激活：将搜索过程分配到应用特定参数。批次确定将在您进行分配后立即激活。

 

批次确定流程的前提条件：

  1. 搜索过程已分配到标准内容中的业务交易。搜索过程包含与业务交易相关的不同策略类型。

  2. 每个策略类型都必须存在一个批次搜索策略。

  3. 选择类必须至少包含一个特征，批次使用该特征分类。

批次管理与制造相关的配置：

 

 

主数据设定相关：

由于订单中的批次确定必须非常灵活，因此 SAP 系统具有四个物料控制选项。可以使用以下设置在视图 “Work scheduling” 的物料主记录“批次输入”字段中定义控制标识.而对于生产订单创建/下达时自动生成批次，“production schedule profile ” 字段按前面已配置好的profile 设定。

 

 

 

使用创建生产订单应用：订单为CRTD时，系统没有自动分配批次。

 

通过管理订单应用下达订单：

点击下达订单，批次自动创建。

entry.title: Writing month values (got from a Form in a story) via a data action to my model (SAC)
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

im just starting in the World of SAC and im trying to solve a thing i cant wrap my head around. Im sure i missed something or it isnt possible at all. Hope your're getting my problem and help me solve it 🙂

I have the requirement that plan values can be entered on a monthly basis in a form in a SAC story.

These should then be transferred to my model via a data action. Now I can easily write a value to the data. If I then call the dataaction repeatedly (12 or 6 times, depending on the scenario), it takes forever. Now I thought I could manage to enter the values as parameters in the data action

%ParameterPlanningValueJanuary%
%ParameterPlanningValueFebrurary%
...

a parameter like %ParameterStartDate% (Date, Single, Year, Month, Leaf) and %ParameterEndDate% to get the count of all the month to change and then write accordingly to the values to the month. 

 

 

My working DA: 

MEMBERSET [d/D_Accounts] = %ParameterAccount% //Sample -> ("571210") im Code "[D_Accounts].[parentId].&[500095]"

MEMBERSET [d/D_Cost_centers] = %tisParameterCostCenter% // Sample DE100

MEMBERSET [d/Date]= %tisParameterPlanningDate% 

DATA([d/Measures] = "LC",
 [d/D_Accounts] = %tisParameterAccount%,
 [d/D_Cost_centers] = %tisParameterCostCenter%) 
 = %tisParameterPlanningValue%
 
My newest try
INTEGER @COUNT
INTEGER @I
@COUNT=DATEDIFF(%tisParameterStartDate%, %tisParameterEndDate%, "MONTH")

FOR @I= 0 TO @COUNT
//here i want to use a if like If I = 1 then write to January, if 2 then to February. Maybe to do it i also need to change I to a parameter aswell. 
The values will be provided by the %ParameterPlanningValue[Month]% paramenters. 


DATA([d/Measures] = "LC", 
 [d/D_Accounts] = %tisParameterAccount%,
     [d/D_Cost_centers] = %tisParameterCostCenter%,
 [d/Date]=NEXT(@I,"MONTH",%tisParameterStartDate%))= @ValueToInsert
ENDFOR

My Code in the scripting part

DataActionCostCenterPlanning_EntryForm.setParameterValue("ParameterCostCenter",DropDownCostCenterSelection.getSelectedKey());
DataActionCostCenterPlanning_EntryForm.setParameterValue("ParameterAccount", "[D_Accounts].[parentId].&["+DropDownAccountSelection.getSelectedKey()+"]");
DataActionCostCenterPlanning_EntryForm.setParameterValue("ParameterStartDate", "[Date].[YM].&[202401]");
DataActionCostCenterPlanning_EntryForm.setParameterValue("ParameterStartDate", "[Date].[YM].&[202406]");
DataActionCostCenterPlanning_EntryForm.setParameterValue("ParameterPlanningValueJanuary", ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(TextBoxValueJanuary.getValue()));
DataActionCostCenterPlanning_EntryForm.execute();

 

 

I hope I was able to explain my case clearly, if not please ask. 🙂

Thanks! 
Mike

entry.content:
Which ui5 library version are you using?
Is you custom component inheriting from or extending a standard component?

entry.title: Re: CBTA date format issue: Why is the &today& token and...
entry.content:
Hello Jeannine,

CBTA interpret %today% and more generally date tokens by using native Windows VBScript functions for which result is directly depending on the Windows date display format (region dependent).

Actually, the leading 0 for the month part of today's date will be present if you select a Windows Date Display Format that is presenting it. You have to select a date format that will both match your windows settings and your test user settings in the corresponding SAP system (transaction SU3 from the tester session).

Best Regards,
Rémi,
CIS - SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Delivery setup indicator for previous year PURCHASE O...
entry.content: Hello Ayush , Thankyou for the reply .I would like to take your help on this even though tolerance is maintained same issue occured in he PO

entry.title: Re: New to the community
entry.content: Welcome to the Community, JP! I'm sure plenty of network suppliers can benefit from your experience on SAP Business Network! And of course, we're glad to see that @AlexanderGraff is never far away from new supplier interactions 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to Migrate on-premise SAP marketing cloud data to...
entry.content:
Hello Shivani,

the easiest way to extract the data from SAP Marketing On-Premise is via the export definitions (via target group/campaign). Probably you have more data and even more complicated (n:m relations) that you want to extract (e.g. permissions). 

Then it's in most cases easier if you can use SQL (TR: DBACOCKPIT) or write your own report.
If you have an huge amount of data I would create a custom report. Then you are quite flexible and you can handle the data better (building batches, background jobs, etc.). 

Of course it depends also in which format you need the data and how you will upload the data in the other application. E.g. if you need to upload the data with CSV/EXCEL then the custom report would be the best option.

Best regards,
Jan

entry.title: Re: Sales order with purchase requisition, without specia...
entry.content: Hey! i will tell you about it in shortly.

entry.title: Difference between implicit enhancement and Pre/Post/Override methods
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I have a question regarding modification.
Could you please tell me the difference between an implicit enhancement and the Pre/Post/Override exits?
With an implicit enhancement I am able to add my own code to the start or end of a standard method.
But couldn't I just use Pre- or Post-methods to archive the same result?
And what solution should be preferred?

Thanks
Chris

entry.title: Re: New Learning experience for mobile
entry.content:
Hi there

You need to enable this in Settings on the mobile app.

Under settings you will now see a toggle for New Experiences and, if Learning is set up on your desktop, the Learning toggle should be there. 

The following article states:

SF_LRN_Mobile.pdf (sap.com)

8.4.1 2024 Preview Features
The June 2024 Preview app delivery includes the new Learning experience, updated app names, bookmarking from
Course Details, time zones for classes, and some other minor functional changes.
Learning Module ......

The Learning switch, found in the app
Settings, provides users with access
to the legacy Learning experience as
needed, such as when accessing downloaded content offline or Approvals. The
switch selection is saved across mobile
sessions when a learner relaunches their
app or restarts their device. This selection is independent of any selection on
the web application.

I hope this helps.

Sam

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello @KStrothmann ,

how does it work in case I just want to use SAP Event Mesh (not advanced) as standalone solution (without SAP Integration Suite) - as it was possible before? Am I forced to license the SAP Integration Suite anyhow?

I can imagine this would have some impact on designing lightweight EDA solutions and its pricing - because not only the messages would be part of the costs but also the SAP integration Suite plan.

Best regards,
Johannes

entry.content:
Hello,

we face the same issue and I already spent a lot of time to find a solution.

Would be great if someone can help us.

Thank You

entry.title: Intelligent project assistant - Customer Engagement Initiative open for registration
entry.content:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is expected to have a significant impact on project management in the future. Hence various intelligent project assistant capabilities are already planned for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition as part our Project System roadmap. 

In order to define intelligent functions providing the biggest value to our customers and meet the expectation of their end-users we have set-up the new Customer Engagement Initiative (CEI) Intelligent assistant capabilities for Project Systems in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. In this CEI we want to work closely together with interested customers to detail our AI roadmap for Project System, validate jointly the business value of use cases and discuss related usability aspects. 

The goal of this initiative and related activities comprise

  • Identification of existing pain points which can be addressed using AI/GenAI capabilities
  • Validation of use cases, and concepts
  • Identification of qualitative and quantitative business values for use cases
  • Collection of usability feedback on early Proof of Concepts

More details e.g. on the format of this CEI, the estimated effort for participating customers, and the registration can be found here: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3719

Customers interested can register for this CEI till 12th of July 2024. 

An initial kick-off call is planned for beginning of August.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Welcome @Michael_Reuscher - have you already joined the Hamburg group? Might be of interest to you.

Intelligent Product Proposal

SAP logon pad is read-only. 

Or you can try the suggestions in note 3443623

entry.title: Re: How To Upload Data to a Public or Private Planning Version Using a File Upload Custom Widget Wi
entry.content:
Hi @sebastian_ ,

An upload to hierarchy nodes is not allowed.

BR Gerd

entry.title: Re: The problem of posting invoices for projects
entry.content:
Hello @Privete_member__1304573 , Cost & revenue in controlling module can only be posted to one real cost object only, in this case WBS & order both assiged, you need to remove one of them.

Why one real cost object - othrewise it will result in duplicate value posted in CO module let say expense of 100 in FI module if  it is posted to both WBS & order it will be 200 in CO module which is not correct, that's why system will not allow.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI options configuration file editable versus re...
entry.content:
SAP Logon.

3443623 - SAP GUI for Windows: Read-only options dialog - SAP for Me

This note corresponds to the chapter 9.1 of SAP GUI 8.00 administration guide, of course I have read directly 9.2, not 9.1 😞

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Multiple SFC scan in SFC field in the POD
entry.content: when I try to scan SFCs one by one in the SFC field on the operation POD, it is clearing the previous scanned SFC from the SFC field. But I am able to select multiple SFCs from the worklist. is there any configurationor possibilities to do multiple scan selection in DM?

entry.title: PDF document in a BDC recording/program
entry.content:
I have a requirement in which I need to attach a PDF document into a BDC recording which would eventually upload that document in a standard transaction.

Could not find anything worthwhile on community.

Would appreciate if someone can throw some light on this whether it can be done and if yes, whats the best way?

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Johannes @Johannes23,

Currently nothing has changed in respect to SAP Event Mesh. You can license SAP Event Mesh standalone as before. Or you can go for EMIS. Or, if you want to go for a more powerful offering, Advanced Event Mesh. So in the end you can pick what fits for you from the portfolio.

What is going to happen in future is harder to say. We have understood that the lightweight EDA solution is highly valued and appreciated, and that there is a need for a smaller offering in the market.

I intend to write a blog on how the pieces fit together some time in the coming weeks.

Best,

Karsten

entry.title: Re: New Learning experience for mobile
entry.content: According to our Learning Team, there is a choice made to default it on or off when the New Learning experience is enabled.

entry.title: Re: ndc: BarcodeScannerButton not allowed to be placed in...
entry.content: I am using 1.71.x and my custom component extends from sap/ui/core/Control

entry.title: Re: Spool file authority setting
entry.content:
Hi Jan,

I found afunction for my label printouts: ADS_SR_OPEN. In the debugger I always come along.
Yes, it's for label printing out of the WM but it seems it is my solution. I didn't found an universal solution (function) for all printouts.

Many thanks for you help and kind regards

Roland

entry.title: With SAP Quartz Dark Theme when I open a Message in Business Workplace, text colour is invisible
entry.content:
With SAP Quartz Dark Theme when I open a Message in Business Workplace, I can see no content, only a black Screen (background colour is black and text colour is also black). Can the text colour be changed?

SAP Logon for Windows
800 Final Release - 64bit
8000.1.3.1161
2204446

entry.title: Re: Truck is stuck at the gate for 1 hour
Re: Multiple SLD Targets on a AS JAVA System
entry.content:
Depending on the technical System, some have their own data supplier:

1869701 - Overview of the SLD Data Suppliers of Technical Systems

If you enabled Outside Discovery and is not reflecting in LMDB get below logs:

  • Diagnostics agent logs 2455767 - How to Generate or Download the Diagnostics Agent "Support Logs" - Solution Manager  
  • SAP Host Agent logs 1292836 - Logfiles of the SAP Hostagent

    From agent logs we want to check e2edcc.log to review if there is a statement showing that Outside Discovery has been enabled via SAP Host Agent 

    [DCCService.isHostOutsideDiscoveryEnabled]: true

    If so, configuration from Agent administration / application configuration seems correct. 

    Then the host agent needs to execute a webservice called Outside Discovery which will create a log in saphost agent logs called OutsideDiscovery.log . From there we need to observe if SLDReg is working fine, if we detect any error, LMDB will not show this work, then we need to contact the host agent team to verify why OutsideDiscovery is not working fine.

entry.title: Re: Sustainability Control Tower latest
entry.content:
Hi there achowdhury,

to upload data to Sustainability Control Tower, please use Manage ESG Data app or Inbound APIs

The process you mentioned "Actuals - create new records based on data in DPI" is used when data are saved to the DPI directly from the other sources, e.g. emission data from EHS EM .

Best Regards, 

Lenka Simikova

entry.title: Re: GLT2201 - Balancing field profit center in line item...
entry.content:
Hi,

You may please check OADB-define depreciation areas how many depreciation areas maintained as Posting in GL "1 Area Post in Real Time" and then go to ACSET maintain each depreciation area 'Account Assignment Objects' and save.

Goto ACSET and maintain Account assignments objects.

Thanks and regards,

Moin

entry.title: SAP FICA - Clarification processing through FPMA
entry.content:
hI Experts,

 I have payment documents sitting in clarification bucket, I do not want to process it manually, is there a way out to pick up the clarification items and auto clear the clarification items through FPMA - Automatic clearing job? 

Regards,

Ram

entry.title: Re: SAP MM-WM reverse IBD error - M7329 ekla-lwsbb exceeded by 50 quantity error
entry.content: You finde a solution for this error?

entry.title: Purchasing Rebates S/4HANA_Update of Material MAP
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We are trying to implement the purchasing rebate scenario of Settlement Management. The requirement from our client is to distribute the rebate amount during final settlement (or delta accrual settlement) to the material affecting the Moving Average Price. Is there any way to achieve this?

Thank you!!!

entry.title: Re: Error when working with correction file during migration
entry.content:
Dear all, I have found the solution myself. I will leave it here in case someone will need it. The problem was that in the asset class, depreciation area was deactivated. Even though the asset type was <LAND> and it should not have any depreciation, the right way is to activate depreciation area and then change DepKy to <No Depreciation and No Interest>. 

SPRO/Financial Accounting/Asset Accounting/General valuation/Determine Depreciation Areas in the Asset Class

Execute and check if your asset class deactivated. If so activate it by unchecking the box, then turn DepKy to <No Depreciation and No Interest> and save.

entry.title: Re: ndc: BarcodeScannerButton not allowed to be placed in...
entry.content: This is a way too lower version. I think the Eslint is much more strict since 1.xx. Furthermore the Barcodescanner is also not available on 1.71, but thanks anyway!
